Curriculum Vitae — synthetic fixture, not a real person

Experience

Logistics Operations Lead — Hafenkette GmbH, Berlin, Germany
March 2020 – present
Runs daily dispatch and last-mile routing for a Berlin grocery delivery
operation covering 14 distribution zones; cut average delivery delay by 22%
after redesigning the morning loading schedule with the warehouse team.
Leads a shift team of eleven dispatchers and coordinates carrier contracts.

Warehouse Shift Supervisor — Spreewald Fulfilment, Berlin, Germany
June 2015 – February 2020
Supervised inbound goods receiving and pick-pack throughput on the night shift;
owned the weekly stock-accuracy reconciliation and trained seasonal staff.

Logistics Coordinator — Nordstern Versand, Hamburg, Germany
September 2011 – May 2015
Scheduled freight pickups and maintained the returns-processing queue for a
mail-order retailer.

Education

(Vocational diploma, Freight Forwarding & Logistics) — Berufsschule Mitte,
Berlin, Germany. 2008 – 2011.

negotiation, shift scheduling, stock reconciliation, team leadership.
